steps.title: Set up the equation with profit of 900 dollars
steps.content: We need to find $x$ when the profit is 900 dollars. Using the function $p(x) = 6x - 180$, we set: $$6x - 180 = 900$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content: Add 180 to both sides: $$6x = 1080$$ Divide both sides by 6: $$x = 180$$ They must sell 180 laptop decals.
